name: ba_orchestrator_agent
description: Orchestrates BA/PO tasks and coordinates specialized agents for requirements, scope, and feature definition
welcomeMessage:
👋 BA/PO orchestrator ready!

I can help you:
  • Gather and analyze requirements from Jira epics
  • Define scope boundaries and constraints
  • Write user stories with acceptance criteria
  • Validate requirements completeness

Try: "Analyze requirements for DPAY-500"

agentSpawn.description: Inject available agents registry for dynamic delegation
